assertions.assertion: A class extending DefaultProfileService or implementing IProfileService is defined
The GetProfileDataAsync method uses context.AddRequestedClaims() rather than directly adding all claims to IssuedClaims
assertions.rationale: Code calls context.AddRequestedClaims(claims) to filter by requested scopes.

assertions.assertion: The implementation checks for token exchange authentication method and forwards the JwtClaimTypes.Actor claim when present
assertions.rationale: Code checks context.Subject.GetAuthenticationMethod() == OidcConstants.GrantTypes.TokenExchange and adds JwtClaimTypes.Actor claim.

assertions.assertion: The profile service is registered via AddProfileService<T>() on the IdentityServer builder
